n: Chapter 8.3: The Words in the Wards

steps.t: Corudan has asked you to speak with residents of the Upper Ward of Umbar Baharbêl about Azagath and the other leaders of the Kindred that fled with hi…
Corudan has asked you to speak with residents of the Lower Ward of Umbar Baharbêl about Azagath and the other leaders of the Kindred that fled with hi…
Corudan has asked you to speak with residents of the Lower Ward of Umbar Baharbêl about Azagath and the other leaders of the Kindred that fled with hi…
A man in the Lower Ward told you he saw a well-dressed man in blue and silver walking along one of the north-south piers extending out into the waters…
Belondor stands atop one of the piers extending out into the waters of the Sail-haven.
